# Test: grove add --switch --detach shows preserved files
setup_workspace

# Create .gitignore with .env pattern (required for preservation)
cp $WORK/gitignore-env .gitignore
exec git add .gitignore
exec git commit -m 'add gitignore'

# Create tag to detach at
exec git -C $WORK/testrepo tag v1.0.0
exec git -C $WORK/workspace/.bare fetch --tags

# Create .env file to be preserved
cp $WORK/dot-env .env
exec grove add --switch --detach v1.0.0
stdout '^.*[/\\]v1.0.0$'
! stderr 'Created detached worktree'
stderr 'preserved'
stderr '.env'
exists ../v1.0.0/.env

-- gitignore-env --
.env

-- dot-env --
SECRET=value
